lede: A look at January 31 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Sára Bejlek and Yves Ma-Kalambay, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Med Jets Flight 056
events.desc: Med Jets Flight 056 crashes near Roosevelt Mall in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, killing 8 people and injuring 23.

events.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force
events.desc: Emergency officials in Boston mistakenly identify battery-powered LED placards depicting characters from Aqua Teen Hunger Force as Improvised explosive devices (IEDs), causing a panic.

events.title: Alaska Airlines Flight 261
events.desc: Alaska Airlines Flight 261 crash: An MD-83, experiencing horizontal stabilizer problems, crashes in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of Point Mugu, California, killing all 88 aboard.

events.title: Doug Williams (quarterback)
events.desc: Doug Williams becomes the first African American quarterback to play in a Super Bowl and leads the Washington Redskins to victory in Super Bowl XXII.

events.title: Space Race
events.desc: Cold War: Space Race: The Explorer 1, the first successful American satellite, detects the Van Allen radiation belt.

events.title: Battle of George Square
events.desc: The Battle of George Square takes place in Glasgow, Scotland, during a campaign for shorter working hours.

events.title: Wilhelm II
events.desc: World War I: Kaiser Wilhelm II orders the resumption of unrestricted submarine warfare.

events.title: Mat Salleh Rebellion
events.desc: Datu Muhammad Salleh is killed in Kampung Teboh, Tambunan, ending the Mat Salleh Rebellion.

events.title: Eighty Years' War
events.desc: Eighty Years' War and Anglo-Spanish War: The Battle of Gembloux is a victory for Spanish forces led by Don John of Austria over a rebel army of Dutch, Flemish, English, Scottish, German, French and Walloons.

events.title: Pope Sylvester I
events.desc: Pope Sylvester I is consecrated, as successor to the late Pope Miltiades.

deaths.text: Rashad Khalifa, Egyptian American biochemist and academic
Shri Krishna Sinha, Indian politician, 1st Chief Minister of Bihar
Claudio Acquaviva, Italian priest, 5th Superior General of the Society of Jesus
